title: Skyblock Recombobulated Panorama
description: A Hypixel Skyblock themed panorama background for the Skyblock Recombobulated modpack.
body:
Adds a **Hypixel Skyblock** themed **background** and **title** for the [Skyblock Recombobulated](https://modrinth.com/modpack/skyblock-recombobulated) modpack. 
### **The rest of the GUI is not changed by this resource pack!**
![New Hypixel Skyblock themed panorama and title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45dc0c82ed468b4fa4d2f09983160fdb550ef8c9.jpeg)
